content: not  Table of contents Prototype: not(expression) Return type: boolean Description: Returns any if all arguments evaluate to false and !any if any argument evaluates to true. Arguments: expression : string - Class value - in the range: .* Argument Descriptions: expression - Class, class expression, or function that returns a class Example: code commands : "/usr/bin/generate_config $(config) " if => not ( fileexists ( "/etc/config/ $(config) " ) ); Notes: Introduced primarily for use with if and unless promise attributes. See also: and() , or() History: Introduced in 3.2.0, Nova 2.1.0 (2011) Return type changed from string to boolean in 3.17.0 (2020) (CFE-3470)
